summary.playerMeaning: A measured stage-11 layout candidate now better matches the third Galaga challenge reference while keeping challenge stages safe.
summary.processMeaning: Future challenge tuning can now compare many runtime candidates against Galaga labels before editing game constants.
summary.nextStep: Promote the best candidate into the stage-11 layout, rebuild, and rerun challenge-stage conformance plus guardrails.

measurementPolicy.reference: media-backed Galaga challenge labels with comparison vectors
measurementPolicy.promotionRule: Require expected challenge-3 best match, no safety regression, and at least +0.35/10 expected-label lift over baseline before runtime promotion.
measurementPolicy.safety: Reject candidates with enemy shots, enemy attack starts, or ship losses in the challenge window.
